goal: Reopen the Meow Coin shop with Siam Paws as the first shop-EXCLUSIVE deck (100 coins) — a deck obtainable only by spending coins, not on any free ladder
done: Siam Paws is a 'cold-storage' deck in data/decks.json (not on any streak/sign-in ladder); full art + -200 thumbs already on the CDN (848x1264 = default ratio). Wired it as the first shop deck: (1) Added 'siam-paws' to js/data.js DECKS with role:'shop', unlock_day:null, name_th 'เหมียวสยาม'. (2) canUnlockDeck now returns false for role:'shop' decks unless purchased (added BEFORE the `!unlock_day -> true` fallthrough, AFTER the isPurchasedDeck check) — so a shop deck unlocks ONLY via a coin purchase. (3) getDecksForDisplay filters out unpurchased shop decks so they don't render as broken 'Day null' locked cells on the streak surfaces (profile My Decks / home strip / board picker); once bought, canUnlockDeck is true and they appear like any owned deck. 'Your decks' (decks.js) already filters to owned, so it's hidden there until bought too. (4) shop.js SHOP_DECKS = [siam-paws]; buyDeck spends 100 -> purchaseDeck (writes meowtarot_purchased_decks) -> deck usable everywhere. Added a guard: if DECKS[id] is missing (stale unversioned data.js within its 1h edge cache) buyDeck bails with a 'refresh' toast instead of spending coins that purchaseDeck would then no-op. Cache-bust ?v=20260621c -> 20260621d; www synced. Halloween stays out (no source art on R2).
fix: role:'shop' + canUnlockDeck purchase-gate + getDecksForDisplay hide-until-owned + SHOP_DECKS entry + stale-data.js buy guard.
verified: headless shop.html: Siam Paws renders with CDN back-200 art + 100-coin buy button + balance pill; nav Shop tab active
logged-out Your Decks still shows only Moonmallow (siam-paws role 'shop' excluded)
